message:
fix: BigInt precision loss in window aggregates and partial aggregation

Number(bigint) silently loses precision for int64 values > 2^53.
Window aggregate SUM/MIN/MAX and partial-agg now detect bigint columns
and use native BigInt accumulators. AVG still returns Number (inherently
floating-point). Extracted frameRange() helper to reduce duplication in
the number/bigint window paths.
